display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(165, 243, 252) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SkillResult
status, outputs_written
failure_reason
failure_category:
MISSING_INPUT |
MALFORMED_ARTIFACT |
CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION |
INCOMPLETE_OUTPUT |
CONSTITUTIONAL_HALT

div.style: color: rgb(187, 247, 208) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AgentResult
status
can_evaluate_exit_gate
failure_origin: agent_body
invoked_skills[]

div.style: color: rgb(196, 181, 253) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
NodeExecutionResult
node_id, final_state
failure_origin:
entry_gate | agent_body |
exit_gate | null
exit_gate_evaluated

span.p:
call_slicer.py
Extracts target call from grouped WP JSONs
Produces *.slice.json (~5-8KB)
Runs once, before any node dispatch
